page_metadata.biotools__summary: This is a project that brings Semantic Web “features” to the popular Systems Biology software Cytoscape. It allows to query, visualize and reason on ontologies represented in OWL or RDF within Cytoscape.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This is a project that brings Semantic Web “features” to the popular Systems Biology software Cytoscape. It allows to query, visualize and reason on ontologies represented in OWL or RDF within Cytoscape.
